subject: Fermi GBM trigger 477254668/160215781 is not a GRB
body:
Matthew Stanbro (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 477254668/160215781
at 18:44:24.52 UT on 15 February 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB.

This trigger is due to solar activity."

-- 
Matthew C. Stanbro
Fermi GBM Graduate Research Assistant
University of Alabama in Huntsville
